title: ayenia mastatalensis
intro: Ayenia mastatalensis is a rare and endemic plant species native to Costa Rica, belonging to the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the barberry family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ayenia mastatalensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ayenia mastatalensis often involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from the plant's leaves, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
